{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/4051999?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/chdanielmueller/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/chdanielmueller/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/chdanielmueller/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/chdanielmueller/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/chdanielmueller", "id": 4051999, "login": "chdanielmueller", "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjQwNTE5OTk=", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/chdanielmueller/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/chdanielmueller/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/chdanielmueller/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/chdanielmueller/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/chdanielmueller/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/chdanielmueller", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-41427", "cvss": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 8.4, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:N/PR:L/UI:N/VC:L/VI:H/VA:N/SC:L/SI:H/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-863", "name": "Incorrect Authorization"}], "description": "### Am I affected?

  You're affected if all of the following are true:

  - Using @better-auth/oauth-provider at version specified below 
  - You configured clientPrivileges in the plugin options expecting it to gate who can create OAuth clients
  - The /oauth2/create-client or /admin/oauth2/create-client endpoints are reachable by authenticated users you don't fully trust

  If clientPrivileges is not configured, this bug has no security consequence for your deployment

  ---
  ### Summary

  The clientPrivileges option documents a create action, but the OAuth client creation endpoints did not invoke the hook before persisting new clients. Deployments that configured clientPrivileges to restrict client registration were not actually restricted — any authenticated user could reach the create endpoints and register an OAuth client with attacker-chosen redirect URIs and metadata.

 Non-create operations (read, list, update, delete, rotate) enforced the hook correctly. Only the create path was missing the check.

### Impact

  - Unauthorized registration of OAuth clients by any authenticated user, under deployments that expected clientPrivileges to block them.
  - Attacker-controlled redirect_uris on those clients enable phishing flows that present as registered first-party applications.
  - If the SERVER_ONLY admin creation endpoint is also exposed to low-privilege users (a separate deployment misconfiguration), additional sensitive fields including `skip_consent` become writable.

### Patches

Fixed in `@better-auth/oauth-provider@1.6.5` Both create endpoints now call the clientPrivileges hook with action "create" before persisting the client record.

### Workarounds

  If you cannot upgrade immediately:

  - Block the /oauth2/create-client and /admin/oauth2/create-client routes at your reverse proxy or middleware layer for any user who should not be able to register clients.
  - Do not expose the admin creation endpoint (it is SERVER_ONLY by design and should not be reachable by end-user sessions).", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00212, "percentile": 0.11482}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-xr8f-h2gw-9xh6", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-04-16T22:44:27Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-xr8f-h2gw-9xh6", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-xr8f-h2gw-9xh6"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-41427"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-04-24T20:16:27Z", "published_at": "2026-04-16T22:44:27Z", "references": ["https://github.com/better-auth/better-auth/security/advisories/GHSA-xr8f-h2gw-9xh6", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-41427", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-xr8f-h2gw-9xh6"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/better-auth/better-auth/security-advisories/GHSA-xr8f-h2gw-9xh6", "severity": "high", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/better-auth/better-auth", "summary": "OAuth 2.1 Provider: Unprivileged users can register OAuth clients", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-04-27T15:24:30Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-xr8f-h2gw-9xh6", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "1.6.5", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "@better-auth/oauth-provider"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 1.4.8-beta.7, < 1.6.5"}, {"first_patched_version": null, "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "@better-auth/oauth-provider"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 1.7.0-beta.0, <= 1.7.0-beta.1"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: OAuth 2.1 Provider: Unprivileged users can register OAuth clients
